message:
Add project CLAUDE.md with testing and architecture notes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Mutter Butter
+
+GNOME 50 Shell extension for grid-based window management with live-scaling stamps.
+
+## Testing
+- Unit tests: `gjs -m tests/gridEngine.test.js && gjs -m tests/stampPlacer.test.js && gjs -m tests/focusTracker.test.js`
+- Schema compilation: `glib-compile-schemas schemas/`
+- Integration testing: `mutter --nested --wayland` with the extension loaded
+
+## Architecture
+- Pure-logic modules in `lib/` (gridEngine, stampPlacer, focusTracker) — testable outside Shell
+- Shell-dependent modules (scaleManager, inputRouter, dragHandler) — test in nested Mutter
+- See `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-03-mutter-butter-design.md` for full spec
+
+## Key Design Decisions
+- Clone uses allocation-based scaling (Clutter.Clone auto-scales to fit allocation)
+- Real actor stays visible (opacity=0) for clone rendering; pick-hidden via Shell.util_set_hidden_from_pick
+- Stamp drag uses Clutter.grab() for reliable event capture
+- Full-size drag uses grab-op-begin/end with pointer polling
+- Focus tracker is the single authoritative restore path
